rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns residential property tax exemptions for homeowners. Gov't Code §2306.185 governs affordability requirements for multifamily rental housing developments receiving state assistance. The provisions address distinct subject matter with no operative overlap.
quote:
The department shall adopt policies and procedures to ensure that, for a multifamily rental housing development funded through loans, grants, or tax credits under this chapter, the owner of the development:
(1) keeps the rents affordable for low income tenants for the longest period that is economically feasible; and
(2) provides regular maintenance to keep the development sanitary, decent, and safe and otherwise complies with the requirements of Section 2306.186.
_note: No conflict identified. The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption operates in a separate statutory domain from Gov't Code §2306.185 multifamily rental housing affordability rules.
